commit_scope: Add BML token cursor and body-source span metadata for real thesis companion method bodies without expanding BML/BMF kernel-native semantics.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/tests/bml-source-cursor-body-span-proof.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-bmf-grammar-body-source-proof.fk
local_validation.notes: The new proof parses original BMF-grammar.bml and verifies Compile and HandleArgs bodies have BodySource token-span metadata whose length matches retained token values while preserving ParseStream, Invoke, PrintCommandLineHelp, and Compile tokens.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: BML method bodies parsed from the known-working thesis companion source are represented as native Form BodySource components with explicit token span metadata. Existing BodySource value access remains compatible.
test_flows: python3 scripts/audit_bml_bmf_kernel_natives.py before commit to prove no new BML/BMF host-native semantics were introduced.

phase_gate.reason: This slice adds the token cursor/span representation needed for sequential BML body parsing. Full thesis parity still requires replacing recursive body collectors with state-step runners and executing the full BMF/BML method semantics from the reference corpus.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/tests/bml-source-cursor-body-span-proof.fk parses original BMF-grammar.bml and validates token-span metadata on retained method bodies.
form/form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-bmf-grammar-body-source-proof.fk remains green, proving prior real-body retention behavior was not regressed.
scripts/audit_bml_bmf_kernel_natives.py remains the boundary guard against adding BML/BMF semantics to the host kernels.
